Label: N/A
Issue: does not specify requirements for data redundancy and backup.
Correction: The APAF system shall implement data redundancy and backup procedures to ensure no data loss, with backups performed daily and stored at multiple locations.

Label: N/A
Issue: does not mention a disaster recovery plan.
Correction: The APAF system shall maintain a detailed disaster recovery plan that includes procedures for daily data backups, offsite storage, and step-by-step instructions for system restoration.

Label: APAF-FR-01
Issue: Does not specify the format for telemetry data
Correction: The system shall acquire telemetry data in a standardized format such as CCSDS.

Label: APAF-FR-02
Issue: Does not specify the processing time for data sets
Correction: The system shall process all ASPERA-3 science data into IDFS data sets within 24 hours of acquisition.

Label: APAF-FR-05
Issue: does not fulfill the template: missing 'Verification Method' field

Label: APAF-FR-07
Issue: Does not specify the update frequency for web-based displays
Correction: The system shall update web-based displays of the most current ASPERA-3 data every 15 minutes.

Label: APAF-PR-01
Issue: implies a login functionality that isn't specified
Correction: There will be a user authentication in web server for the team to log in.

Label: APAF-CR-01
Issue: lacks specific details on hardware specifications and software dependencies.
Correction: The UNIX-based system shall have at least 1 GB RAM and 256 GB storage.

Label: APAF-CR-02
Issue: Does not specify the archival system to be used for the UNIX-based APAF system production computer.
Correction: The archival system shall use a RAID-5 configuration for data redundancy and integrity.

Label: APAF-LR-01 to APAF-LR-02
Issue: does not specify detailed maintenance and support procedures.
Correction: The SwRI software team shall perform routine maintenance tasks on the APAF system monthly, including system updates, backups, and performance checks.

Label: APAF-DS-II-1

Correction: ESOC Data Disposition System Interface Control Document (DDID), ME-ESC-IF-5001, Mars Express Space / Ground Interface Control Document (SGICD) (ESA Document).
